zh.lifeSummary: 當John Houghton於大約1500年出生在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德時，他的父親Sir Henry Houghton23歲，母親Joan Bridmore19歲。他於1522年與Margerie Colmer在英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1562年4月23日在英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Houghton于大约1500年出生在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德时，他的父亲Sir Henry Houghton23岁，母亲Joan Bridmore19岁。他于1522年与Margerie Colmer在英国英格兰哈普爾鐵費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1562年4月23日在英国英格兰哈普爾鐵費爾德享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Houghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Haughton
meanings: English: habitational name from Haughton (Cheshire, Lancashire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Staffordshire), or Haughton le Skerne (Durham). The placenames derive from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .
Irish: adopted for Ó hEacháin ‘descendant of Eachán’, a pet form of the personal name Eachaidh (see Hoey ).
Irish: adopted for Ó hEachtair ‘descendant of Eachtair’, a personal name of uncertain origin. Compare Hoctor .

variants.name: Hufton
meanings: English: habitational name; probably from Stony Houghton in Pleasley (Derbyshire), the name of which derives from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Houghton was born about 1500, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, his father, Sir Henry Houghton, was 23 and his mother, Joan Bridmore, was 19. He married Margerie Colmer in 1522, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 April 1562, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Houghton est né environ 1500, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Houghton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan Bridmore, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margerie Colmer en 1522, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1562, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Houghton um 1500 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Houghton 23 und seine Mutter Joan Bridmore 19. Er hat 1522 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Margerie Colmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. April 1562 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Houghton è nato il circa 1500 nel Titchfield, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry Houghton, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Joan Bridmore, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margerie Colmer nel 1522, nel Titchfield, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 aprile 1562, nel Titchfield, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Houghtonが約1500年にイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Houghtonは23歳，母Joan Bridmoreは19歳であった。1522年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドでMargerie Colmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1562年4月23日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Houghton(이)가 대략 1500년 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Houghton(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Bridmore(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1522년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 Margerie Colmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1562년 4월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Houghton nasceu aproximadamente 1500, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Houghton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bridmore, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margerie Colmer em 1522, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1562, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Houghton родился около 1500 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Houghton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Bridmore, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margerie Colmer в 1522 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 апреля 1562 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Houghton nació aproximadamente 1500, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Houghton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Joan Bridmore, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margerie Colmer en 1522, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de abril de 1562, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
